summary: Bug fix verified - Premium page now loads correctly after replacing FREE_TOKENS_PER_SESSION with FREE_DAILY_TOKENS. All backend APIs and frontend Premium page working as expected.
passed_tests: User registration works and returns token with daily_tokens_remaining=1 (FREE_DAILY_TOKENS used correctly)
User login works and returns user data with correct token values
/api/premium/status returns packages array with 2 packages (premium_monthly, premium_yearly)
/api/premium/packages returns available packages with correct prices (£7.99, £59.99)
Premium page loads with 'Premium Benefits' section displaying 6 benefits
Premium page shows Monthly plan (£7.99, 30 days)
Premium page shows Yearly plan (£59.99, 365 days) with 'Best Value' tag
All required data-testid attributes present (premium-page, package-premium_monthly, package-premium_yearly)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Premium page displays correctly with benefits and plans

test_credentials.note: New users can be registered with any email/password combination

seed_data_creation: None needed - used dynamic test user creation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. FREE_DAILY_TOKENS constant is correctly used throughout the codebase in lines 394, 422, 443, 479, 1370, 1942, 1972 of server.py. Premium page (/premium) loads correctly showing benefits and subscription plans.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: FREE_TOKENS_PER_SESSION variable was referenced but never defined. Only FREE_DAILY_TOKENS was defined at line 42 of server.py
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Replaced all occurrences of FREE_TOKENS_PER_SESSION with FREE_DAILY_TOKENS
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All backend tests pass, Premium page loads correctly with benefits and subscription plans visible
